# Jordan Licon Photography - Full AI Reference

Jordan Licon is an El Paso photographer and cinematographer specializing in commercial photography, executive headshots, architectural photography, editorial portraiture, brand campaigns, cinematography, and FAA-certified aerial production.

## Studio

Jordan Licon Photography
2201 East Mills Ave, 2nd Floor
El Paso, TX 79901
Phone: +1 915 226 6037
Email: info@jordanliconphotography.com

## Services

Executive Headshots:
Private studio and on-location headshot sessions with cinematic lighting, expression coaching, proof galleries, retouched final images, and commercial licensing options. Individual sessions start at $350 and include 2 finalized headshots and 3 outfits; additional finalized headshots are $200 each.

Corporate Team Headshots:
Consistent lighting, framing, and color across full teams. Pricing varies by team size, images per person, location, hair/makeup, rush delivery, and background needs.

Architectural Photography:
Architecture, interiors, hospitality, commercial real estate, public infrastructure, and institutional spaces for architects, developers, design firms, and civic organizations.

Brand, Editorial, and Cinematography:
Full-production campaigns with talent direction, cinematic lighting, editorial portraiture, video production, and aerial visuals.

Aerial / Drone:
FAA Part 107 certified aerial imagery for architecture, broadcast, editorial, and commercial production.

## Selected Credits

Office of Vice President Mike Pence; U.S. Department of Health & Human Services; Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas; The CW; Food Network - Beat Bobby Flay; Ironclad - Borderland: Dispatches; HBO / Warner Media; National Geographic; UCLA; Perkins&Will; Sanders\Wingo; The City Magazine; Miss Sun City USA; AIA El Paso; Fast Lane Drive; Palmer James Designs.

## Institutions and Commercial Clients

Perkins&Will; Carl Daniel Architects; AIA El Paso; El Paso Community Foundation; El Paso Chamber of Commerce; WALA International Commerce; Inclusive Logistics; KF Logistics; Tiwa Inc.; Novatech Inc.; Flor de Michoacan; Sunflower Bank; Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas; Las Palmas Del Sol; Paul L. Foster School of Medicine; UCLA; Fast Lane Drive; Palmer James Designs.
